summary: Recording appears to be mislabeled; reviewers flag the date as incorrect.
review: Both reviewers point out that the file is incorrectly dated, asserting it is from 4/4/85 rather than a 1984 show. No comments are made about the audio quality or musical performance, leaving those aspects unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews, both focusing on a metadata error and assigning zero stars; no information on show or recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No audio‑quality comments provided; reviewers only mention incorrect dating.
